What's Included

Our Bathroom Services

🚿

Showers & Tubs

  • Frameless glass enclosures
  • Custom tile showers
  • Rain head systems
  • Built-in niches & shelving
  • Freestanding tub installations
🪞

Vanities & Fixtures

  • Custom & semi-custom vanities
  • Quartz & stone countertops
  • LED & backlit mirrors
  • Matte black / chrome fixtures
  • Undermount sink installations
🧱

Tile & Flooring

  • Large-format porcelain tile
  • Marble & natural stone
  • Heated floor systems
  • Custom mosaic & accent tile
  • Waterproofing & membrane
⚡

Electrical & Plumbing

  • Full rough-in & finishing
  • Pot light & vanity lighting
  • GFCI outlet installation
  • Exhaust fan upgrades
  • Permit applications
🏠

Full Gut Renovations

  • Complete demo & removal
  • Subfloor repair & leveling
  • Drywall & cement board
  • Structural modifications
  • Disposal & cleanup
✨

Finishing Touches

  • Paint & trim work
  • Towel bar & accessory install
  • Caulking & grouting
  • Final inspection & touch-ups
  • Full site cleanup
How It Works

Our Renovation Process

1

Free Estimate

Jeff comes to your home, assesses the space, and gives you a detailed no-pressure quote.

2

Design & Plan

We help you choose tile, fixtures, and finishes that fit your style and budget.

3

Demo & Build

Our team handles everything — demo, rough-in, tile, fixtures, and all finishing work.

4

Final Walkthrough

We walk through every detail with you until you're 100% satisfied with the result.
